summary: Claude Agent SDK empty/invalid JSON failures now record structured response diagnostics, including per-attempt result metadata and compact event traces.
Plan generation failure handling persists those diagnostics into last_failure details so /why-failed can distinguish empty end_turn-style responses from upstream API issues.
A fixture-based planning regression test now replays the draft 1481565649607331942 requirement summary through the /plan path and verifies empty-response detection is recorded.
risks: The new diagnostics improve classification, but root-cause removal still depends on observing more failing samples from the real Claude SDK/runtime path.
Pyright still reports pre-existing repository warnings; this change introduced no new type errors.
